You've Got to Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now? - JSX Basics - (4)
You've Got to Learn React Eventually, So Why Not Now?

You've probably heard people throw around the term "JSX" — but what actually is it? It kind of sounds like one of those things you absolutely have to learn if you want to write React. In this post we'll get to know what JSX really is, walk through its basic syntax, and cover keys, expressions, array spreading, comments, and how styles and classes work differently from plain HTML.
